name: aurora-ai-tool
title: Aurora AI Tool
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Aurora-native tool parity surface from AI Elements.
docs:
Aurora block that installs Aurora AI Tool.

Install `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, `aurora-tool-calls`, and `aurora-components` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/ai/tool.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-ai-elements`, `aurora-tool-calls`, `aurora-components`.
